"cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-674", "name": "Uncontrolled Recursion"}], "description": "`Faraday::NestedParamsEncoder`, the default nested query parameter encoder/decoder in Faraday, decodes nested query strings without enforcing a maximum nesting depth.

A crafted query string such as:

```text
a[x][x][x][x]...[x]=1
```

causes Faraday to build a deeply nested Ruby `Hash` structure. The internal `dehash` routine then recursively walks this attacker-controlled structure without a depth limit. At sufficient depth, Ruby raises an uncaught `SystemStackError` (`stack level too deep`), crashing the calling thread or worker. This can lead to denial of service in applications that pass attacker-controlled query strings to Faraday's nested query parsing or URL-building paths.

This has been patched in version 2.14.3 and backported to 1.10.6.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00391, "percentile": 0.30933}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-98m9-hrrm-r99r", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T19:35:43Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-98m9-hrrm-r99r", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-98m9-hrrm-r99r"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-54297"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-24T17:17:29Z", "published_at": "2026-06-19T19:35:43Z", "references": ["https://github.com/lostisland/faraday/security/advisories/GHSA-98m9-hrrm-r99r", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-54297", "https://github.com/lostisland/faraday/pull/1681", "https://github.com/lostisland/faraday/releases/tag/v1.10.6", "https://github.com/lostisland/faraday/releases/tag/v2.14.3", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-98m9-hrrm-r99r"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/lostisland/faraday/security-advisories/GHSA-98m9-hrrm-r99r", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/lostisland/faraday", "summary": "Faraday: Uncontrolled recursion in NestedParamsEncoder allows stack exhaustion DoS via deeply nested query parameters", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-26T19:27:21Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-98m9-hrrm-r99r", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.14.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "rubygems", "name": "faraday"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.0.0, <= 2.14.2"}, {"first_patched_version": "1.10.6", "package": {"ecosystem": "rubygems", "name": "faraday"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 1.0.0, <= 1.10.5"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Faraday: Uncontrolled recursion in NestedParamsEncoder allows stack exhaustion DoS via deeply nested query parameters
